title: alstonia sebusii
intro: Alstonia sebusii, also known as the "Malaysian Alstonia" or "Pulai", is a medicinal plant species native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Alstonia sebusii has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Alstonia sebusii include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in traditional remedies for malaria and other diseases. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Alstonia sebusii are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health ailments.
